description_long: This is a modern, rectangular desk with a dark wood grain finish, featuring a solid, flat tabletop and a sturdy construction. On the right side, there is a vertical stack of three drawers, each with a subtle horizontal groove serving as a handle, providing organized storage space. The left side is supported by a solid panel leg, while the right side is enclosed by the drawer unit, giving the desk a balanced and contemporary look. The wood texture is consistent across all visible surfaces, suggesting a veneer or laminate finish. The desk's design is minimalist, with clean lines and no visible hardware or decorative elements. Its robust build and ample surface area make it suitable for professional or home office environments.
description: A modern, dark wood desk with three right-side drawers and a minimalist, rectangular design. The surface is smooth and the structure is sturdy, ideal for office or study use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full tabletop, three right-side drawers, and solid left panel leg.
description_view_1: Right side view highlighting the depth of the desk and the vertical alignment of the drawers.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the plain rear panel and the solid construction without visible drawers.
description_view_3: Left side view showing the solid left panel and the desk's overall depth.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the one with the three drawers on the right, intended to be accessed from the front for seating and drawer use; the solid panel is on the left, and the back is plain.
